case_title: GLOBAL NEON VS RAFFI, BRIAN ROUGH TRADE RECORDS

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO BRIAN RAFFI (ROUGH TRADE RECORDS) RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $230.00 FILED BY GLOBAL NEON AS TO DEFENDANT RAFFI, BRIAN    ROUGH TRADE RECORDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
